title: Beef and Olive Tagine with Preserved Lemon
meta_description: A slow-cooked Moroccan beef tagine with olives and preserved lemon — halal french cooking that bridges North Africa and your weeknight table. 60 minutes.
og_title: Beef & Olive Tagine with Preserved Lemon
og_description: Halal beef simmered with saffron, preserved lemon, and green olives until the broth is deep and fragrant. Moroccan technique, French pantry sensibility, one pot.

image_briefs.prompt: Overhead view of a deep cast-iron casserole filled with glossy amber broth, chunks of beef, potato wedges, green olives, and strips of preserved lemon. Natural window light from the left, scattered fresh parsley, dark wooden table surface. Moroccan terracotta tone palette, warm and slightly shadowed.
image_briefs.alt: Halal beef and olive tagine with preserved lemon in a cast-iron casserole, overhead view

image_briefs.prompt: Flat lay on a linen cloth: cubed raw halal beef, small bowl of green olives, half a preserved lemon showing its rind, garlic cloves, a pinch of saffron threads on a white ceramic spoon, small piles of turmeric and ginger powder, potato wedges, sliced onion. Natural daylight, no props besides the ingredients.
image_briefs.alt: Raw ingredients for halal beef tagine including preserved lemon, saffron, olives, and spices

image_briefs.prompt: Close-up of beef cubes browning in a heavy stainless pan with golden saffron-tinged oil, onions visible around the edges, steam rising. Warm kitchen light, slightly shallow depth of field focused on the sizzling meat surface.
image_briefs.alt: Halal beef cubes browning in spiced olive oil for the tagine

image_briefs.prompt: Tagine served in a shallow wide bowl, broth ladled over potato wedges and beef, two green olives visible, a strip of preserved lemon rind draped on top, fresh parsley leaves scattered. Side of torn flatbread partially in frame. Warm afternoon light, matte ceramic bowl, off-white background.
image_briefs.alt: Plated halal beef tagine with preserved lemon and olives served with flatbread

pinterest_overlay_text: Halal Beef Tagine — Saffron, Lemon, Olives
email_subject: Tagine night: beef, olives, preserved lemon
